[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a cropped view of black text on a white background with only partial characters visible.

Main Subject:
The main visible content is a block of large black characters, cut off at the edges, forming partial words.

Setting:
The background is plain white, with no visible environment or scene elements.

Visual Details:
The text appears in a bold, sans-serif font and is left-aligned, stacked in multiple lines. Some characters are cut off on the left and top, and portions of lines are cropped so that only fragments like “n 1 1”, “ppng”, “bwt”, and “tryhard” are partially readable. Lighting is flat and even, with no shadows or other objects.

Visible Text:
n 1 1
ppng
bwt
tryhard

Practical Summary:
This image is a close-up crop of black text on a white background. The text is partially cut off, leaving only fragments of several lines visible.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

n 1 1  
ppng  
bwt  
tryhard

# Notes

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
